hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pixi run ./bin/shipit hook pretooluse; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then echo "shipit: PreToolUse guard could not run (rc=$rc) — refusing edit. The guard requires pixi to resolve shipit; install pixi (https://pixi.sh) or otherwise ensure 'pixi run ./bin/shipit hook pretooluse' succeeds, then retry." >&2; exit 2; fi
